Size Guide

Fans Version sizing · all measurements in cm

Size Length Width Height & Weight
S70cm50cm165–170cm / 50–60kg
M73cm52cm170–175cm / 60–70kg
L75cm54cm175–180cm / 70–80kg
XL78cm56cm185–195cm / 80–85kg
XXL80cm58cm>195cm / 95–110kg

Allow 1–3cm deviation due to manual measurement. Unsure? DM us on Telegram!
